channel.title: HoopsHype Rumors - Utah Jazz
channel.description: Utah Jazz trade rumors and free agency buzz from HoopsHype

item.title: Other teams that are known to have some interest in …
item.description: Other teams that are known to have some interest in Reaves — like Utah and Atlanta, per league sources — would need to make roster moves to find the necessary space. League sources say winning will be a significant factor in Reaves’ thinking.

item.title: “I doubt [Washington] decided who they want, just like …
item.description: Ainge is operating under the assumption that everything is on the table, including Dybantsa. “I doubt [Washington] decided who they want, just like we haven’t decided who we want,” Ainge said. “We will figure out who is one and two on our board and be ready. There are at least two good players in this draft.”

item.title: Inside a sterile room on the edge of Lake Michigan, …
item.description: Inside a sterile room on the edge of Lake Michigan, Austin Ainge let out a “yes” that cut through the quiet. “Well, I couldn’t just sit there and do nothing,” Ainge justified later, smirking. The Utah Jazz’s president of basketball operations spent the last year trying to create NBA draft lottery luck in a place where none previously existed. Not only did he guide his team to 60 losses to secure the fourth-best odds, he personally surveyed every potential draft room representative to see who had

item.title: Ainge also told me he would consider trading down from …
item.description: Ainge also told me he would consider trading down from Utah's top selection. "We're open," he said. "We'll always listen."

item.title: Utah actually won the No. 3 pick after popping up …
item.description: Jake Fischer: Emerging from the sequestered lottery room to report Utah actually won the No. 3 pick after popping up second as well. So, the league had to toss out that outcome and draw again… which led to the Grizzlies claiming the third pick.

item.title: Wizards win 2026 draft lottery
item.description: Shams Charania: Top 4 order in the 2026 NBA Draft: 1. Washington Wizards 2. Utah Jazz 3. Memphis Grizzlies 4. Chicago Bulls

item.title: Wizards, Jazz, Grizzlies and Bulls make the top four in the draft lottery
item.description: Josh Robbins: The Wizards, Jazz, Grizzlies and Bulls are the teams that will draft somewhere in the top four.

item.title: Other teams that are known to have some interest in …
item.description: Other teams that are known to have some interest in Reaves — like Utah and Atlanta, per league sources — would need to make roster moves to find the necessary space. League sources say winning will be a significant factor in Reaves’ thinking.

item.title: “I doubt [Washington] decided who they want, just like …
item.description: Ainge is operating under the assumption that everything is on the table, including Dybantsa. “I doubt [Washington] decided who they want, just like we haven’t decided who we want,” Ainge said. “We will figure out who is one and two on our board and be ready. There are at least two good players in this draft.”

item.title: Inside a sterile room on the edge of Lake Michigan, …
item.description: Inside a sterile room on the edge of Lake Michigan, Austin Ainge let out a “yes” that cut through the quiet. “Well, I couldn’t just sit there and do nothing,” Ainge justified later, smirking. The Utah Jazz’s president of basketball operations spent the last year trying to create NBA draft lottery luck in a place where none previously existed. Not only did he guide his team to 60 losses to secure the fourth-best odds, he personally surveyed every potential draft room representative to see who had

item.title: Ainge also told me he would consider trading down from …
item.description: Ainge also told me he would consider trading down from Utah's top selection. "We're open," he said. "We'll always listen."

item.title: Utah actually won the No. 3 pick after popping up …
item.description: Jake Fischer: Emerging from the sequestered lottery room to report Utah actually won the No. 3 pick after popping up second as well. So, the league had to toss out that outcome and draw again… which led to the Grizzlies claiming the third pick.

item.title: Wizards win 2026 draft lottery
item.description: Shams Charania: Top 4 order in the 2026 NBA Draft: 1. Washington Wizards 2. Utah Jazz 3. Memphis Grizzlies 4. Chicago Bulls

item.title: Wizards, Jazz, Grizzlies and Bulls make the top four in the draft lottery
item.description: Josh Robbins: The Wizards, Jazz, Grizzlies and Bulls are the teams that will draft somewhere in the top four.
